executives.name: Kevin Freeman
executives.background: Kevin M. Freeman has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since July 2023. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer from May 2018 to June 2023, and as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer from May 2011 to May 2018. He joined the Company in 1992.

executives.name: Adam Satterfield
executives.background: Adam N. Satterfield has served as Executive Vice President, Finance, Chief Financial Officer and Assistant Secretary since January 2016. He joined the Company in 2004 and has held various financial leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Finance, Chief Financial Officer and Assistant Secretary

executives.name: Christopher Brooks
executives.background: Christopher J. Brooks has served as Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since July 2023. He previously served as Senior Vice President - Operations from May 2018 to June 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Gregory Plemmons
executives.background: Gregory B. Plemmons has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since July 2024. He previously served as Senior Vice President - Sales.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

board_of_directors.name: David Congdon
board_of_directors.background: David S. Congdon has served as Executive Chairman of the Board since May 2018. He was Vice Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer from January 2008 to May 2018. He has been with the Company since 1978.

board_of_directors.name: Earl Congdon
board_of_directors.background: Earl E. Congdon is Senior Executive Chairman of the Board. He served as Executive Chairman from 2008 to 2018 and CEO from 1985 to 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Greg Gantt
board_of_directors.background: Greg C. Gantt served as President and CEO from 2018 until his retirement in June 2023. He remains a member of the Board.

board_of_directors.name: Sherry Aaholm
board_of_directors.background: Sherry A. Aaholm is the former Vice President and Chief Digital Officer of Cummins Inc. She joined the ODFL board in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: John Congdon, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: John R. Congdon, Jr. has served as a director since 1998. He is the former Vice Chairman of Old Dominion Truck Leasing, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Bradley Gabosch
board_of_directors.background: Bradley R. Gabosch is a retired partner of Grant Thornton LLP. He joined the board in 2017.
